mapper.insert: INSERT INTO balances (business_id, account_id, currency, available_amount, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{businessId}, #{accountId}, #{currency}, #{availableAmount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, business_id, account_id, currency, available_amount, created_at, updated_at FROM balances WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND currency = #{currency} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE balances SET available_amount = #{availableAmount}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
